action: Created HookRegistry + HookEvent with TDD. Code Quality Review requested logging.warning for exceptions — added. User accepted best-effort fire() semantics.
notes: CQR wanted error propagation/configurable policies — user chose to keep best-effort semantics with logging.warning

task_title: Integration — Refactor modules to use hooks.fire()
action: Refactored 5 modules to use HookRegistry.fire() instead of direct FlowLog.step(). CQR initially flagged fire() semantics (same as Task 1), user confirmed it was already accepted. CQR approved on re-review.
notes: CQR kept flagging fire() best-effort semantics — already accepted in Task 1

action: Updated test_orchestrator.py and test_langgraph.py to use HookRegistry. test_flow_log.py, test_router.py, test_cli.py needed no changes. 58/58 non-langgraph tests pass.
notes: Concern: test_langgraph.py fails due to missing langgraph module — pre-existing, not hooks-related

action: Verified full test suite (111 pass, 10 pre-existing failures), /log output format preserved, no old log.step patterns remain. No code changes needed.
Merged feat/hook-system into main. 8 commits, 13 files changed, 310 insertions, 39 deletions. Tests verified on main: 111 pass, 10 pre-existing failures.
